capsule.meta.title: Capsule — letters sealed on-chain
capsule.meta.description: Write a letter to your future self. Encrypted on-chain, never lost, readable only by you — and, if you choose, locked until a day you set.
capsule.tagline: A letter to your future self — encrypted on-chain, readable only by you.
capsule.permanence: Once sealed, it can't be edited or deleted — it lives as long as this chain.
capsule.write.placeholder: Write this moment. Only you will ever read it again.
capsule.write.placeholderLocked: A letter to your future self… revealed only on the day you set.
capsule.lock.hint: Until that moment, not even you can open it.
capsule.meta.oneADay: one letter per chain, per day
capsule.archive.title: The past
capsule.archive.empty:
No letters from you on this chain yet.
Write the first one.
capsule.letter.lockedTitle: Not yet opened · a letter to the future
capsule.letter.failed: This letter could not be decrypted
capsule.status.creatingKey: Older account — creating a dedicated encryption key…
capsule.status.timelocking: Time-locking (even you can't read it until then)…
capsule.status.signing: Sealing on-chain — sign with your passkey
capsule.error.noWebAuthn: WebAuthn is not available in this browser.
capsule.error.noPrf: This device / account does not support PRF encryption.
capsule.error.tooLongOne: Message is too long for one letter.
capsule.error.pickFuture: Pick a future date to unlock.
capsule.error.unlockFailed: Could not unlock with this passkey.
capsule.error.lowBalance: Not enough balance for gas (a first-time wallet also needs deploying). Top up some {symbol} to {address} and retry.
capsule.error.cooldown: You've already sealed a letter on this chain today — you can write again {when}.
capsule.error.txReverted: That didn't go through. Please try again in a moment.
capsule.error.bundlerGas: The gas relayer's account is out of funds. Deposit about {amount} {symbol} to {address}, then try again.
capsule.gate.title: Choose a chain
capsule.gate.subtitle: Your letters will live here. Fixed once you enter — exit to switch.
capsule.onboard.identityProse: First, an identity that is yours alone — a passkey on this device. No password, no seed phrase.
capsule.onboard.nameProse: This name is public and bound to your passkey. It can't be changed once created.
capsule.onboard.keyProse: Derive an encryption key from the passkey you just made — no second passkey, and it never leaves your device. Only it can open your letters.
capsule.onboard.errSyncFailed: Your key was created, but syncing failed. Please try again.
capsule.onboard.errRetryFailed: Retry failed — please try again later.
